/usr/bin/mips-linux-gnu-ar qc libsupport.a CMakeFiles/support.dir/doubles/fake_network_stack.cc.o CMakeFiles/support.dir/doubles/fake_sockets.cc.o CMakeFiles/support.dir/doubles/network_universe.cc.o CMakeFiles/support.dir/src/clock.cc.o CMakeFiles/support.dir/src/environment.cc.o CMakeFiles/support.dir/src/fake_clock.cc.o CMakeFiles/support.dir/src/fake_memory.cc.o CMakeFiles/support.dir/src/fake_random.cc.o CMakeFiles/support.dir/src/fuzz_helpers.cc.o CMakeFiles/support.dir/src/memory.cc.o CMakeFiles/support.dir/src/network.cc.o CMakeFiles/support.dir/src/random.cc.o CMakeFiles/support.dir/src/simulated_environment.cc.o CMakeFiles/support.dir/src/simulation.cc.o CMakeFiles/support.dir/src/tox_network.cc.o CMakeFiles/support.dir/src/tox_runner.cc.o
/usr/bin/mips-linux-gnu-ranlib libsupport.a
